title: Brazilian Sweet Cheese Gratin
description: A rich and creamy Brazilian-inspired dish featuring sweet cheese and a crispy top.

ingredients.name: Sweet Cheese (queso doce)
ingredients.notes: Available at most Brazilian grocery stores

instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together sweet cheese, Brazilian cream cheese, and granulated sugar.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
Remove from heat and stir in egg yolks.
In a separate bowl, whisk together flour and unsalted butter until a crumbly mixture forms.
Add the flour mixture to the cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into 6 (1/2 cup) ramekins or small baking dishes.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the tops are golden brown and the centers are set.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with vanilla extract if desired.
